abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Parts on Order
abilities.text: Once per turn. When a Remains marker is made within 6" of this model, this model may remove it after resolving the current action (if any) to infuse a (soulstone).

abilities.name: Reverse Gyros
abilities.text: After resolving an enemy attack action targeting this model, this model may drain a (soulstone) to move the attacker up to 6".

actions.name: Explosive Calibration
actions.effects: Choose a Remains marker within 6" of the target. X is equal to the distance between the target and the chosen marker (maximum 4). Then, remove the marker and make a Remains marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Skim Schematics
triggers.text: Once per activation. Draw one card for each tactical action printed on the target's stat card.

actions.name: Exploit Vulnerability
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a Staggered token from the target.
actions.effects: If a Staggered token was removed, summon a Self-Repair Bot in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Lost a Wheel
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker within 4" of the target.

actions.name: Quick Weld
actions.effects: Target gains an Improvised Part token.

triggers.name: "Let Me Take a Look"
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.
